sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 8 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25 & 26 2. For hearing of main case 20.04.2026 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the applicant On 16.04.2026, following order was passed: “16.04.2026 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the applicant. 1. Deferred. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Prima facie matter pertains to factual determination undertaken by the Appellate Tribunal based upon appreciation of evidence. No question of law has been articulated before us, however, counsel seeks time to obtain instructions. At his request adjourned to 20.04.2026” Today learned counsel for the applicant pleads no instructions. In view hereof, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
